title: lithocarpus pallidus
intro: Lithocarpus pallidus, also known as the pale-barked evergreen hickory or pale hickory, is a species of evergreen tree native to eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus pallidus have been found to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Lithocarpus pallidus is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts are used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
